__inputs.name: DS_POSTGRES
__inputs.label: Awa Postgres
__inputs.description: Postgres datasource pointing at the awa database

panels.title: Queue Depth by State
panels.description: Current job counts per queue, pivoted by state. Eventually consistent (~2s). Declared-but-idle queues appear too (descriptor catalog is authoritative). Sortable — click column headers.

targets.rawSql: WITH all_queues AS (SELECT queue FROM awa.queue_state_counts UNION SELECT queue FROM awa.queue_descriptors) SELECT q.queue, qd.display_name, qd.owner, COALESCE(qs.available, 0) AS available, COALESCE(qs.running, 0) AS running, COALESCE(qs.completed, 0) AS completed, COALESCE(qs.failed, 0) AS failed, COALESCE(qs.scheduled, 0) AS scheduled, COALESCE(qs.retryable, 0) AS retryable, COALESCE(qs.waiting_external, 0) AS waiting_ext, COALESCE(qs.cancelled, 0) AS cancelled FROM all_queues q LEFT JOIN awa.queue_state_counts qs ON qs.queue = q.queue LEFT JOIN awa.queue_descriptors qd ON qd.queue = q.queue ORDER BY COALESCE(qs.available, 0) DESC, q.queue

panels.title: Queue Lag (oldest pending job)
panels.description: Age of the oldest available job per queue — sorted by lag descending. Shows declared display name when available.

targets.rawSql: SELECT j.queue, qd.display_name, count(*)::bigint AS pending, EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (now() - min(j.run_at)))::float AS lag FROM awa.jobs_hot j LEFT JOIN awa.queue_descriptors qd ON qd.queue = j.queue WHERE j.state = 'available' GROUP BY j.queue, qd.display_name ORDER BY lag DESC LIMIT 20

panels.title: Descriptor Health
panels.description: Stale or drifted queue / job-kind descriptors. Empty table = healthy fleet. Stale = no live runtime has refreshed the descriptor recently. Drift = two or more live runtimes report different descriptor hashes for the same target (normal briefly during a rolling deploy; persistent drift means two code revisions disagree).

targets.rawSql: WITH live_runtimes AS (SELECT * FROM awa.runtime_instances WHERE last_seen_at + make_interval(secs => GREATEST(((GREATEST(snapshot_interval_ms, 1000) / 1000) * 3)::int, 30)) >= now()), queue_variants AS (SELECT descriptor.key AS queue, count(DISTINCT descriptor.value) AS n FROM live_runtimes r CROSS JOIN LATERAL jsonb_each_text(r.queue_descriptor_hashes) AS descriptor(key, value) GROUP BY descriptor.key), kind_variants AS (SELECT descriptor.key AS kind, count(DISTINCT descriptor.value) AS n FROM live_runtimes r CROSS JOIN LATERAL jsonb_each_text(r.job_kind_descriptor_hashes) AS descriptor(key, value) GROUP BY descriptor.key) SELECT 'queue' AS target_type, qd.queue AS target, qd.display_name, qd.owner, qd.last_seen_at, COALESCE(qv.n, 0) AS live_variants, (CASE WHEN qd.last_seen_at + make_interval(secs => GREATEST(((COALESCE(qd.sync_interval_ms, 10000) / 1000) * 3)::int, 30)) < now() THEN 'stale' ELSE '' END || CASE WHEN COALESCE(qv.n, 0) > 1 THEN CASE WHEN qd.last_seen_at + make_interval(secs => GREATEST(((COALESCE(qd.sync_interval_ms, 10000) / 1000) * 3)::int, 30)) < now() THEN '+drift' ELSE 'drift' END ELSE '' END) AS status FROM awa.queue_descriptors qd LEFT JOIN queue_variants qv ON qv.queue = qd.queue WHERE qd.last_seen_at + make_interval(secs => GREATEST(((COALESCE(qd.sync_interval_ms, 10000) / 1000) * 3)::int, 30)) < now() OR COALESCE(qv.n, 0) > 1 UNION ALL SELECT 'kind' AS target_type, kd.kind AS target, kd.display_name, kd.owner, kd.last_seen_at, COALESCE(kv.n, 0) AS live_variants, (CASE WHEN kd.last_seen_at + make_interval(secs => GREATEST(((COALESCE(kd.sync_interval_ms, 10000) / 1000) * 3)::int, 30)) < now() THEN 'stale' ELSE '' END || CASE WHEN COALESCE(kv.n, 0) > 1 THEN CASE WHEN kd.last_seen_at + make_interval(secs => GREATEST(((COALESCE(kd.sync_interval_ms, 10000) / 1000) * 3)::int, 30)) < now() THEN '+drift' ELSE 'drift' END ELSE '' END) AS status FROM awa.job_kind_descriptors kd LEFT JOIN kind_variants kv ON kv.kind = kd.kind WHERE kd.last_seen_at + make_interval(secs => GREATEST(((COALESCE(kd.sync_interval_ms, 10000) / 1000) * 3)::int, 30)) < now() OR COALESCE(kv.n, 0) > 1 ORDER BY status DESC, target_type, target

panels.title: Completed / Failed (last hour)
panels.description: Jobs finalized in the last hour, by queue

targets.rawSql: SELECT date_trunc('minute', finalized_at) AS time, queue || ' ' || state::text AS metric, count(*)::bigint AS value FROM awa.jobs_hot WHERE state IN ('completed', 'failed') AND finalized_at > now() - interval '1 hour' GROUP BY 1, 2 ORDER BY 1

panels.title: Failed Jobs (recent)
panels.description: Most recent failed jobs with error details

targets.rawSql: SELECT id, kind, queue, attempt, max_attempts, finalized_at, errors[array_upper(errors, 1)]->>'error' AS last_error FROM awa.jobs_hot WHERE state = 'failed' ORDER BY finalized_at DESC LIMIT 20

panels.title: Cron Schedules
panels.description: Registered cron schedules with last enqueue time

targets.rawSql: SELECT name, cron_expr, timezone, kind, queue, last_enqueued_at, EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (now() - last_enqueued_at))::float AS age FROM awa.cron_jobs ORDER BY name

panels.title: Runtime Instances
panels.description: Connected worker instances and their health, including the number of queue/kind descriptors each is publishing

targets.rawSql: SELECT hostname, version, healthy, leader, poll_loop_alive, heartbeat_alive, maintenance_alive, shutting_down, last_seen_at, jsonb_array_length(queues) AS queue_count, (SELECT count(*) FROM jsonb_object_keys(queue_descriptor_hashes))::int AS queue_descs, (SELECT count(*) FROM jsonb_object_keys(job_kind_descriptor_hashes))::int AS kind_descs FROM awa.runtime_instances WHERE last_seen_at > now() - interval '5 minutes' ORDER BY hostname
SELECT COALESCE(sum(available), 0)::bigint AS value FROM awa.queue_state_counts
SELECT COALESCE(sum(running), 0)::bigint AS value FROM awa.queue_state_counts
SELECT COALESCE(sum(failed), 0)::bigint AS value FROM awa.queue_state_counts
SELECT COALESCE(sum(scheduled), 0)::bigint AS value FROM awa.queue_state_counts
SELECT count(*)::bigint AS value FROM awa.queue_meta WHERE paused = true
